package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for migration_or_seed_logic_callable_from_request_handlers: Request handlers that can trigger migration or seed workflows.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule094NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule094NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule094NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario094Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule094NegativeService, input Rule094NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
